arts.ttl: Josh Cullen brings a calmness to this team – Clarets boss Scott Parker
arts.sum: Burnley FC boss Scott Parker says there aren’t enough words to describe the impact Josh Cullen is having on his side.

arts.ttl: Potential Boro team vs Burnley with Michael Carrick facing five big decisions
arts.sum: Michael Carrick will face some big selection calls for Middlesbrough's trip to Burnley and Friday evening, with Boro's improving injury picture giving the head coach an array of riches to choose from. Back in contention for the game are Seny Dieng, Rav van den Berg and Riley McGree, with Boro expected to go to Burnley with real belief and ambition.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's big Alex Bangura decision which could impact January transfer work
arts.sum: As a result of Bangura's long-term injury, Boro left the defender out of their EFL squad in the summer as they registered the maximum 25 players. Middlesbrough will soon have a big decision to make on Alex Bangura which could have big implications on work they are able to do in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Positive news for Burnley as three first team players set to return
arts.sum: Burnley trio Hjalmar Ekdal, Joe Worrall, and Hannes Delcroix all featured for the club’s U21s as they bid to… The post Positive news for Burnley as three first team players set to return appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
Will Maxwell has provided a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship this weekend.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What David Sullivan thinks about replacing Julen Lopetegui with Michael Carrick as West Ham manager
Scott Parker's Middlesbrough verdict suggests Michael Carrick's side have what they want
arts.sum: They now face a real acid test of their promotion credentials, however, when they travel to Turf Moor to take on pre-season promotion favourites Burnley who, having overhauled their squad in the summer, sit second after four consecutive wins heading into this one. Despite that, it was clear from Parker's views on Boro ahead of the game that they've succeeded in ensuring their promotion rivals are taking them very seriously.

arts.ttl: ‘Started to gain real momentum’ – Burnley vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Burnley vs Middlesbrough prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Friday. The post ‘Started to gain real momentum’ – Burnley vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Potential Darragh Lenihan return timeframe as Middlesbrough defender moves closer
arts.sum: Darragh Lenihan could finally be nearing a return for Middlesbrough, with Michael Carrick putting a tentative timeframe of soon after Christmas for the defender. But offering an update on Lenihan as Boro's injury picture begins to improve, he offered an encouraging update on the Irish international.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker believes there is still more to come from Burnley keeper James Trafford
arts.sum: James Trafford’s “difficult” time in the Premier League was very much at the forefront of Scott Parker’s mind when he walked into the club back in July.
